query_or_target: FormulaDiscourseUnit/FragmentAnswer/FragmentQuestion runtime, grammar-audit, fixture, and context-license extraction
source_type: internal runtime, fixture, and governance inspection
used_for: exact fallback profiles, accepted-fixture counts, source gaps, and representation risks
limit_or_disposition: Internal behavior and fixture acceptance are not Cantonese language authority.

query_or_target: Yip and Matthews 2000 Unit 23 short answers
used_for: predicate repetition, negated replies, lexeme-specific 使唔使 answers, and aspectual replies
limit_or_disposition: Teaching examples do not prove exhaustive modern productivity or one ellipsis analysis.

used_for: 唔該, 唔該晒, 多謝, 對唔住, and 唔好意思 lexical mapping
limit_or_disposition: Exact formulae are sourced individually; no general formula-building rule follows.

query_or_target: Cheng 2022 response particles hai6 in Cantonese
source_type: peer-reviewed journal publisher preview and metadata
used_for: 係/唔係 response-particle subtype and question versus assertion response boundary
limit_or_disposition: Preview supports exact opening claims, not the runtime’s complete particle/repetition inventory.

query_or_target: Huang, Her, and Kong 2025 Cantonese interrogative response diagnostics
used_for: negative-polar-question 係啊/啱嘅 versus 唔係啊/唔啱 response pattern

query_or_target: Luke and Nancarrow 1998 Cantonese auxiliary standalone and ellipsis behavior
limit_or_disposition: One corpus and theory of auxiliaryhood do not establish a flat modern modal-answer class.

query_or_target: Lee and Pan 2024 Cantonese VP ellipsis licensing
source_type: official peer-reviewed conference proceedings full text
used_for: selective head/use licensing and 有/冇/未 versus progressive 喺度 boundary
limit_or_disposition: Movement/right-dislocation analyses do not directly validate every dialogue answer.

source_type: peer-reviewed book chapter full text and metadata
